name: PICO-8
description: PICO-8 fantasy console palette. 16 colors, perfect for tiny games and game jams.

name: DB32
description: DawnBringer 32-color palette. The most popular pixel art palette, versatile for any style.

name: Endesga 32
description: Endesga 32-color palette. Vibrant and saturated, great for colorful worlds.

name: Resurrect 64
description: Resurrect 64-color palette. Rich and detailed, ideal for complex environments.

name: Sweetie 16
description: Sweetie 16 palette. Pastel and cute, perfect for chibi/cute style games.

name: Ink 5
description: 5-shade monochrome palette. For ink-wash or minimalist black-and-white style.

name: Nuclear Blaze 8
description: 8-color warm palette. Dark industrial atmosphere with warm highlights.

name: Mushi 8
description: 8-color nature palette. Muted organic tones for forest/nature scenes.
